mentions.note: Cramer's preferred higher-yielding energy pick over Cheniere Energy.
Preferred midstream energy / LNG transport play over MVGS. Stronger structural position in energy infrastructure.

Best-run pipeline operator; 5.9% yield. Not primary LNG exporter but critical feed-gas, liquids, fractionation infrastructure. 'Arms dealer' to energy ecosystem. Benefits from broader North American gas expansion. Safe income + growth.
Master limited partnership; better growth-and-income alternative to AT&T; performed well during war and before.
Tom (Texas caller) holds good position. Cramer doubles down—6% yield, want to own it for fixed income, terrific play.
